questions.question_text: Is happiness possible in modern world? Explain in the light of Russell’s The Conquest of Happiness.
Explain Jacque Derrida’s Deconstruction theory. Do you agree that Deconstruction is not destruction?
What is the title significance of “The Lotus Eater” by Somerset Maugham?
Is there a significant relation between language and political thought? Explain rules of writing a good prose in the light of Orwell’s “Politics and the English Language”.
Discuss emotional conflicts in Paul Morel the protagonist having a stifle connection with a tough mother in D.H. Lawrence “Sons and Lovers”.
“It is we”, says Hazlitt, “who are Hamlet”. Illustrate with textual examples Hamlet as a universal character.
Marxists and Sociologists believe literature as an expression of society. Explain this statement. Also enlist limitations of Marxist criticism in detail.
